abstract: Coding distillation skill for the opencode TypeScript codebase. Contains 352KB of real code extracted from the sst/opencode repo — complete service implementations, tool modules, test suites, SQL schemas, server routes, architecture maps, PR review patterns, and refactoring diffs from the core team. 11 reference files organized as a workflow: orient (architecture) → gather (helpers) → build (task-specific reference) → check (style DNA) → review (reviewer voice). Evaluated: +33% skill advantage on test writing tasks vs no-skill baseline.
